---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for the skill
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What's the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature and how it would work. Which phase(s) of the skill would it affect?

## Project Context

- **Project type**: Flutter / Native iOS / Both
- **Strategy involved** (if applicable): A / B / C / D / E / New strategy

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought of?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, examples, or links to related tools/libraries.
